diff_snippet:
@@ -48,8 +48,9 @@ definitions:
           - PYTHONPATH="$(pwd)/src" python3 -m revue.cli validate --config .revue.yml
           - echo "[revue] Starting AI code review..."
           - export PYTHONPATH="$(pwd)/src"
-          - export APP_ENV=staging  # Enable REVUE_TIER_OVERRIDE for CI
+          - export APP_ENV=production  # Use real licence validation via revue-io.fly.dev
           - export REVUE_METRICS_ENABLED=1
+          - export REVUE_LOG_LEVEL=DEBUG
           # Provider and model are read from .revue.yml — no --provider/--model flags needed.
           # Set the API key CI variable matching your configured provider:
           #   anthropic → ANTHROPIC_API_KEY   openai → OPENAI_API_KEY  (REVUE-148)
@@ -58,67 +59,151 @@ definitions:
         artifacts:
           - .revue/metrics.jsonl
 
+    - step: &build-macos
+        name: "Build macOS ARM64"
+        runs-on:
+          - self.hosted
+          - macos
+        script:
+          - export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH"
+          - python3.12 -m venv .build-venv
+          - .build-venv/bin/pip install nuitka ordered-set zstandard
+          - .build-venv/bin/pip install -e src/
+          - .build-venv/bin/python -u build/build_nuitka.py
+          - .build-venv/bin/python -u build/build_wheel.py
+        artifacts:
+          - dist/wheels/*.whl
+
+    - step: &build-linux
+        name: "Build Linux x86_64"
+        image: python:3.12-slim
+        caches:
+          - pip
+        script:
+          - apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends gcc patchelf libc6-dev
+          - pip install nuitka ordered-set zstandard
+          - pip install -e src/
+          - python -u build/build_nuitka.py
+          - python -u build/build_wheel.py
+        artifacts:
+          - dist/wheels/*.whl
+
+    - step: &publish-pypi
+        name: "Publish CLI → PyPI"
+        script:
+          - pip install --quiet twine
+          - |
+            if ls dist/wheels/*.whl 2>/dev/null; then
+              export TWINE_USERNAME=__token__
+              export TWINE_PASSWORD=$PYPI_API_TOKEN
+              python -m twine upload --non-interactive --skip-existing dist/wheels/*.whl
+            else
+              echo "No wheels found — skipping PyPI upload"
+            fi
+
 pipelines:
   branches:
     main:
       - step: *run-tests
-      - parallel:
-          steps:
-            - step:
-                name: "Build Linux x86_64"
-                image: python:3.12-slim
-                caches:
-                  - pip
-                script:
-                  - apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends gcc patchelf libc6-dev
-                  - pip install nuitka ordered-set zstandard
-                  - pip install -e src/
-                  - python build/build_nuitka.py
-                  - python build/build_wheel.py
-                artifacts:
-                  - dist/wheels/*.whl
-            - step:
-                name: "Build Linux A
comment_body_excerpt: **🟡 [MEDIUM] The 'Tag Release' step pushes a git tag without verifying that the tag creation succeeded. If git tag fails (e.g., due to invalid version format), the script continues and attempts to push a non-existent tag, which silently succeeds but leaves the repository in an inconsistent state.**
